title: Amazon Basics Stainless Steel Heavy-Duty Rectangular Cheese Grater, 4-Sided Box Grater With Non-Slip Base, 22.9 cm, Black
features: Durable stainless steel: heavy-duty cheese grater constructed from 18/0 stainless steel (95%) for long-lasting strength
Blades on 4 sides: sharp stainless-steel shredding holes on 4 sides allow for efficient grating of a variety of foods, including cheese, vegetables, chocolate and more
Ergonomic handle: the comfortable stainless-steel handle provides a safe, secure grip and ultimate control
Non-slip base: black TPE material (5%) on the base helps keep the grater securely in place while in use
Easy care: dishwasher-safe for quick clean-up
Previously Amazon Commercial brand, now Amazon Basics
description: From the manufacturer Durable Stainless Steel Made of 18/0 stainless steel, the heavy-duty cheese grater provides rugged strength and long-lasting performance. Sharp Blades on 4 Sides The sharp stainless-steel shredding holes on all four sides ensure smooth, efficient grating. Sturdy Handle, Non-Slip Base The ergonomic stainless-steel handle offers a comfortable, secure grip, while non-slip black TPE material on the base keeps the grater in place. Multipurpose Versatility The grater works well for grating cheese and hard or soft vegetables, like cucumbers, cabbage, carrots, onions, potatoes, courgettes and more. Is this product dishwasher safe? Yes, this product is dishwasher safe. Is this product made of stainless steel? Yes, this product is made of stainless steel. Is this product BPA free? Yes, this product is BPA free.
